site.title: Mongolstay — Submit in 4 minutes. Pay. Done.
site.description: Two visa filings, one click each. J-1 to F-1 change of status, $2,000 flat. Asylum applications, $4,000 flat. Licensed immigration attorneys included.

auth.signInS: Sign in to track your application status and read attorney messages.
auth.signUpS: Track your filing, get attorney updates, and pick up where you left off.
auth.name: Full name
auth.checkEmail: Check your email — we sent a confirmation link.
auth.signupEmailHint: Use the email you used to file. We'll auto-attach your application.
auth.pwHint: At least 10 characters with upper, lower, and a number.
auth.pwTooShort: Password must be at least 10 characters.
auth.pwTooSimple: Password needs an uppercase letter, lowercase letter, and a number.

dashboard.title: Your applications
dashboard.sub: Status, schedule, documents, and any new attorney messages — all in one place.
dashboard.emptyS: Start a filing — your status will show up here as soon as you submit.
dashboard.unread: {count, plural, one {# new message} other {# new messages}}
dashboard.noMessages: No messages yet. Your attorney will reach out here once they review your file.

hero.sub: Two visa filings, one click each. Upload documents, pay a flat fee, book your in-person appointment. A licensed immigration attorney reviews everything before it touches USCIS.

j1f1.body: Stay in the U.S. as a student without leaving. We handle the I-539, the home-residency analysis, and the supporting legal brief.

b1b2f1.body: Visiting on a tourist or business visa and want to stay as a student? We file the I-539 and the supporting brief showing the change of intent.

asylum.body: If you fear returning to your country, we'll prepare your asylum application and stand with you through the interview. One year filing deadline applies.

how.sub: You spend four minutes online. We spend two weeks on the legal work. Then you walk out of our office with a filing — not homework.

01.p: Four quick questions. We tell you instantly whether to file and which form.

02.p: Drag & drop your passport, I-94, I-20, financials. Missing one? We collect it later.

03.p: Flat fee, attorney review included. Refunded if our attorneys decline your case.

04.p: Pick a 30-minute slot — Manhattan office or Zoom. Walk out with your filing.

wins.sub: Real USCIS approval notices from Mongolstay clients. We blur the personal details — the seal, the receipt number, and the word that matters all stay legible.

team.sub: Every Mongolstay filing is reviewed and signed by a licensed immigration attorney. The software handles the typing. We handle the law.

footer.fine: © Mongolstay PLLC. Attorney advertising. Prior results do not guarantee similar outcomes.

eligibility.s: A few questions. We'll know if J-1 → F-1 is the right path.

documents.s: PDF, JPG, or PNG. Drop in whatever you can find — we collect the rest at your appointment.

schedule.s: Book an in-person or video appointment, or request a callback. We'll confirm your contact info too.

payment.s: Card, Zelle, or cash at your appointment. Refunded if our attorneys decline your case after review.

eligibility.h: A few questions about your situation.
eligibility.s: These determine your filing strategy. Nothing you say here is filed with USCIS.

elig.verdictS_j1f1: Based on your answers, we'll prepare an I-539 change of status petition. A licensed attorney will review before filing.
elig.verdictS_b1b2f1: Based on your answers, we'll prepare an I-539 change of status petition with a supporting brief showing your change of intent. A licensed attorney will review before filing.
elig.verdictS_asylum: Based on your answers, we'll prepare an I-589 asylum application. A licensed attorney will review before filing.

docs.bannerS: Files are stored under attorney–client privilege. We'll request anything missing in your appointment.
docs.skipLink: Skip — we'll collect the rest in your appointment
docs.idleHint: Click to upload — PDF, JPG, PNG · max 10MB

i94.name: Form I-94
i94.hint: Most recent travel record · download from CBP

i20.name: Form I-20 from new school
i20.hint: Issued by your accepting U.S. school

i94.name: Form I-94 arrival record
i94.hint: Most recent U.S. entry record · download from CBP

visa.name: B-1 / B-2 visa stamp
visa.hint: Photo or scan of the visa page in your passport

i20.name: Form I-20 from new school
i20.hint: Issued by your accepting U.S. school

statement.name: Personal statement (draft)

callback.heading: When should we call?
callback.notePh: I prefer Mongolian · I'm in PST · etc.

pay.secured: 256-bit TLS · processed by Stripe · refunded if attorney declines case
pay.footAsylum: Asylum filings have no USCIS fee.

card.label: Card
card.body: Click "Pay ${total}" to enter card details on a secure Stripe page. You'll be returned here as soon as payment clears.

zelle.label: Zelle
zelle.body: Send ${total} via Zelle. Use the reference below as the memo so we can match your payment.
zelle.foot: We'll mark your filing paid once we receive the transfer (usually within minutes).

cash.label: Pay at appointment
cash.body: Bring ${total} in cash or a cashier's check to your appointment. We'll issue a printed receipt and start the filing.
cash.foot: Your filing is held in draft until payment is collected at your appointment.
cash.cta: Confirm — I'll pay at the appointment

invoice.title: Invoice
invoice.attorneyIncl: Attorney review and in-person appointment included
invoice.zelleNote: Send via Zelle to {email}, memo "{memo}". We'll mark this paid on receipt.
invoice.cashNote: Bring this invoice and reference {reference} to your appointment.
invoice.foot: Mongolstay PLLC. Attorney advertising. Refundable if attorneys decline the case after review.

filed.s_j1f1: Your I-539 change of status petition is queued for attorney review. We've emailed your confirmation and a checklist of anything we still need.
filed.s_b1b2f1: Your I-539 change of status petition (B-1/B-2 → F-1) is queued for attorney review. We've emailed your confirmation and a checklist of anything we still need.
filed.s_asylum: Your I-589 asylum application is queued for attorney review. We've emailed your confirmation and a checklist of anything we still need.
filed.lettersHeading: While you wait — recent approvals like yours
